title: botrychium simplex var. tenebrosum
intro: Botrychium simplex var. tenebrosum, also known as the dark-crested rattlesnake plantain or dark-crested lady fern, is a rare and unique variety of the fern plant species. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Botrychium simplex var. tenebrosum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable plant in traditional herbalism. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and crushing the fronds to create teas, infusions, or topical applications for its medicinal properties.
